title: Block Distribution & Logistics
description: Items and liquids are routed between blocks via routers, duct routers, stack routers, and liquid routers

use_cases.name: Route Item Round-Robin
use_cases.description: Accepts a single item from a source building and forwards it to the next eligible neighbour in round-robin order, skipping overflow gates. Controlled units can aim to direct output to a specific side.

use_cases.name: Sort & Route Item (Duct)
use_cases.description: Accepts an item only from the front-facing side (rotation). Forwards the item to a neighbour: if a sort-item is configured, matching items go forward (rotation direction) and non-matching items go to other sides; items are transferred only once a progress timer elapses.
use_cases.config: sortItem (Item) — configurable via UI; persisted with write/read

use_cases.name: Batch-Stack & Offload Items
use_cases.description: Extends DuctRouter with a larger item capacity (10). Accumulates items until full, then enters an 'unloading' state and bulk-transfers all held items to a target in rapid succession using the parent's target() logic.
use_cases.overrides: acceptItem — blocks intake while unloading; updateTile — batch-unload loop

use_cases.name: Route Liquid Omni-directionally
use_cases.description: Accepts any liquid that matches the current stored liquid (or when nearly empty). Continuously dumps the current liquid to all adjacent liquid-accepting neighbours via dumpLiquid().

use_cases.name: Sort & Route Payload (Block/Unit)
use_cases.description: Extends PayloadConveyor. Receives a payload (block or unit), checks if it matches the configured sort target, then selects the output direction: matching payloads go straight (recDir); non-matching payloads cycle through remaining output directions. Can be inverted. Logic controllers can override the rotation via LAccess.config.
key_methods: pickNext() — rotates output direction, calls onProximityUpdate()
checkMatch() — matches payload type/block against sorted
use_cases.config: sorted (Block or UnitType) — configurable via UI; persisted with write/read; invert flag

key_relationships: DuctRouter configures sortItem via Item.class config callback
StackRouter extends DuctRouter — batch capacity=10, unloading state machine
LiquidRouter extends LiquidBlock — uses dumpLiquid() from parent
PayloadRouter extends PayloadConveyor — adds sort logic on top of conveyor movement
All routers interact with adjacent Building neighbours via proximity list
common_patterns: All item routers: acceptItem() gates intake → handleItem() stores → updateTile() forwards
DuctRouter & StackRouter: rotation-based directional input (front-face only)
Router: round-robin rotation counter across proximity list
PayloadRouter: direction selection via pickNext() on receive or move failure
Persistence: sortItem/sorted serialised via write()/read() with version byte
important_notes: Router supports player/unit control (ControlBlock) for manual aim. DuctRouter is configurable+saveable (clearOnDoubleTap). StackRouter adds glow effect tied to power status. LiquidRouter accepts liquid if current amount < 0.2f (near-empty threshold). PayloadRouter supports invert flag to flip sort logic; logic-controlled rotation locks for 6 seconds (controlTime=360f).
